name: BLUE DOLPHIN ENERGY CO
summary: Blue Dolphin Energy Company is a petroleum refining and marketing company operating the Nixon facility in Nixon, Texas, which includes a 15,000-bpd crude distillation tower. The company refines crude oil and condensate into finished and intermediate petroleum products including jet fuel, low-sulfur diesel, naphtha, heavy oil-based mud blendstock (HOBM), and atmospheric gas oil (AGO). Blue Dolphin also provides tolling and terminaling services and owns an inactive onshore terminal facility in Freeport, Texas.
